description: Water-source override for private well projects. Adds well permitting, drilling, and testing milestones.

step_overrides.description: Confirm power, telecom, and private-well feasibility/authority requirements before permit submittal.

step_overrides.title: Complete private well tie-in, pressure tank, and potable water service
step_overrides.description: Finalize well water service components and connect potable water service for inspections and occupancy.

append_steps.title: Obtain private well permit/authorization
append_steps.description: Secure required private well approvals before drilling activities.

append_steps.title: Drill well and install casing/pump
append_steps.description: Complete well drilling and core equipment installation.

append_steps.title: Complete well yield and water quality testing
append_steps.description: Verify well output and potability requirements before final occupancy approvals.
